Author: Mayo Botic
Name: DutyDM
Description: Get a Discord DM the instant your duty pops. Join the DutyDM Discord server, enter your Discord username, and the bot will message you the moment your queue is ready - with an in-game popup confirming it sent.
Punchline: Duty-pop alerts straight to your Discord DMs.
Changelog: Party-full alerts now only fire when the last seat fills while you wait (7 -> 8), and are blocked for 30 seconds after leaving a duty. Joining an already-full PF or re-forming after an instance no longer sends a redundant notification.
